LONG_CONTRACT_FIXTURE v1 -- Phase 16 FIDL-05 acceptance fixture.

This synthetic instrument is entered into by PARTY_SENTINEL_HEAD, a limited liability company ("the First Party"), and the Second Party identified herein.

OBLIGATION_SENTINEL_MIDDLE -- Ongoing Performance Obligations.

Each party shall perform the covenants set forth in this Section diligently and without delay, including the obligations relating to service levels, data protection, indemnification, and prompt written notice.

WHEREAS the parties agree that Section 5 addresses administrative escalation paths, dispute resolution processes, and cooperation obligations during the course of pSection 7. TERMINATION_SENTINEL_TAIL -- Termination and Survival.

Either party may terminate this Agreement for cause upon written notice in accordance with the termination procedures set forth in this Section. Upon termination, the provisions of Sections 4 and 6 shall survive in accordance with their terms.

This Agreement shall terminate in accordance with the notice and cure procedures set forth in Section 7, and the parties shall comply with all surviving obligations. This Agreement shall terminate in accordance with the notice and cure procedures set forth in Section 7, and the parties shall comply with all surviving obligations. This Agreement shall terminate in accordance with the notice and cure procedures set forth in Section 7, and the parties shall comply with all surviving obligations. This Agreement shall terminate in accordance with the notice and cure procedures set forth in Section 7, and the parties shall comply with all surviving obligations.
